hero_subtitle: SFTY connects wallet risk scores, transaction monitoring data and sanctions signals into structured workflows that help compliance teams make auditable decisions and manage cases efficiently.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Wallet risk review depends on disconnected data
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to turn isolated wallet risk scores into clear, auditable decisions. This fragmentation slows review workflows and weakens the quality of risk assessment for VASPs managing on-chain activity.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates wallet risk scores, transaction signals, customer data and provider outputs into structured cases with decision logs and evidence to streamline VASP wallet risk review and audit readiness.
workflow_title: From wallet risk signals to review
workflow_description: SFTY organizes wallet risk scores and transaction alerts into structured reviews and cases to support clear decisions and evidence for compliance teams.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented alerts. Structured decision control
why_sfty_description: SFTY transforms isolated wallet risk signals into connected reviews, cases, decisions and audit-ready evidence for clearer compliance control across digital asset workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with structured wallet risk decisions, combining audit-ready evidence and provider orchestration within a secure, enterprise-grade compliance environment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support wallet risk review workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how wallet risk scores connect to case decisions
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how evidence-grade audit logs preserve wallet risk reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Explain how provider outputs are orchestrated for risk aggregation
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for wallet risk review?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance layer that aggregates wallet risk signals, transaction monitoring data and sanctions exposure into structured reviews, decisions and cases for regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle wallet risk cases?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes wallet risk alerts into case workflows with linked customer, wallet and transaction data, enabling compliance teams to review, escalate and document decisions efficiently.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve wallet risk evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves evidence-grade logs of wallet risk alerts, decision records and case history to support audit readiness and regulatory inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYT providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects with multiple KYT and wallet screening providers, consolidating their outputs into one connected compliance operating workflow.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYT or screening providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYT or screening providers but connects their outputs into structured workflows, evidence and reporting for better risk management.
final_title: Turn wallet risk signals into reviewable cases
final_description: See how SFTY connects wallet risk scores, transaction monitoring and sanctions outputs into structured compliance workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
